checks.name: strict_schema_and_json
checks.details: Every line decoded as strict JSON without duplicate keys or non-finite values, validated as the frozen TicketExample schema, and matched canonical newline-terminated JSONL.

checks.name: exact_7x4x5x8_balance
checks.details: All 140 category-priority-sentiment combinations contain exactly variants 01 through 08.

checks.name: unique_ids_and_normalized_content
checks.details: IDs, user messages, assistant messages, and combined conversations remain unique after Unicode NFKC, whitespace collapse, trim, and case folding; all stored strings are NFC, trimmed, and control-character free.

checks.name: placeholder_only_privacy
checks.details: Each user message uses declared allow-listed placeholders; discovered and declared inventories match exactly. After placeholder removal, scans found no email, IP address, URL, SSN, phone, payment-card, UUID, or long numeric identifier pattern.

checks.name: synthetic_cc0_provenance
checks.details: Every record declares source synthetic, license CC0-1.0, contains_real_customer_data false, and the fixed generator identifier. The complete corpus is byte-identical to two independent generator executions.

checks.name: system_prompt_equality
checks.details: All 1,120 system messages exactly equal the TicketTune task contract.

checks.name: assistant_json_equality
checks.details: All assistant messages are canonical strict JSON and exactly equal their corresponding expected objects.

checks.name: response_safety_language
checks.details: All responses use the bounded review-and-route template, include a next safe step and privacy protection, and contain no request for secrets, guaranteed outcome, claimed completed sensitive action, or private-data disclosure phrase.

checks.name: deterministic_source_hash
checks.details: The checked source and both regenerated byte streams share the same SHA-256 digest.

limitations: Pattern-based privacy and safety checks are automated heuristics; byte equality to the deterministic synthetic generator provides the stronger provenance control for this corpus.
This audit is not a human review, does not approve any record for release, and cannot satisfy or change the independent-human-review qualification gate.
